label: Investing
description: Treasury bills, the GSE, mutual funds, and other ways money grows over time.

label: Personal Finance
description: The everyday fundamentals — spending, saving habits, debt, and financial decision-making.

label: Budgeting
description: Planning and tracking income and spending, including for irregular or informal income.

label: Business

description: The behavioural and psychological side of money — habits, discipline, and decision-making under pressure.
